title: arctostaphylos × strigosa
intro: Arctostaphylos × strigosa, also known as Strigose Bearberry or Strigosa Manzanita, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between the Arctostaphylos glauca and Arctostaphylos pungens. It is a shrub that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Arctostaphylos × strigosa include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Arctostaphylos × strigosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
